name: Broker Price Opinion — Statebridge/VisionOne Extraction Schema

fields.name: county
fields.description: County where the subject property is located, as shown in the subject address header of the BPO form
fields.label: County

aiHints.context: Located in the subject property address header row, typically the last label in the sequence: (Subject Address) (City) (State) (Zip Code) (County). The value immediately follows the zip code.
aiHints.format: string — county name only, no state suffix (e.g. 'Okaloosa', not 'Okaloosa County, FL')

fields.name: propertyCondition
fields.description: Overall condition rating of the subject property as reported by the broker, either as a UAD code (C1-C6) or descriptive term (Excellent, Good, Average, Fair, Poor)
fields.label: Property Condition

aiHints.context: Found in the Subject column of the comparable sales grid, on the 'Condition' row. May appear as a UAD condition code (C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6) or a descriptive word. The subject column is the first data column in the comp grid.
aiHints.format: string — prefer the UAD code if present (C1–C6); otherwise return the descriptive word as written (e.g. 'Average', 'Fair', 'Good')

fields.name: asIsValue
fields.description: As-Is Market Value of the subject property in its current condition, expressed as a dollar amount
fields.label: As-Is Market Value

aiHints.context: Dollar amount labeled 'As-Is Market Value' near the top of the BPO form, often on the same page as the subject address. May also appear in a subject sale/listing information section. Look for a line reading 'As-Is Market Value: $XXX,XXX'.
aiHints.format: number — extract as numeric value without currency symbols or commas (e.g. 245000, not '$245,000')

fields.name: repairedValue
fields.description: As-Repaired Market Value (ARV) of the subject property after the proposed repairs, expressed as a dollar amount
fields.label: As-Repaired Market Value

aiHints.context: Dollar amount labeled 'As-Repaired Market Value:' prominently displayed near the top of the form, often directly below or near the subject address header. This is the primary valuation figure on the BPO. Example: 'As-Repaired Market Value: $360,000'.
aiHints.format: number — extract as numeric value without currency symbols or commas (e.g. 360000, not '$360,000')

fields.name: propertyAddress
fields.description: Full street address of the subject property
fields.label: Property Address

aiHints.context: First field in the subject address header row at the top of the BPO form, labeled '(Subject Address)'. Contains street number and street name.
aiHints.format: string — street address only, no city/state/zip (e.g. '420 Paradise Rd')

aiHints.context: Second element in the subject address header row, labeled '(City)'

fields.name: propertyState
fields.description: Two-letter state abbreviation of the subject property
fields.label: State

aiHints.context: Third element in the subject address header row, labeled '(State)'

fields.name: propertyZip
fields.description: Zip code of the subject property
fields.label: Zip Code

aiHints.context: Fourth element in the subject address header row, labeled '(Zip Code)'

fields.name: effectiveDate
fields.description: Date the BPO report was completed or signed by the service provider
fields.label: Report Date

aiHints.context: Found in the signature block at the bottom of the form, labeled 'Report Date'. Also may appear as the submission or signature date.
aiHints.format: date — return in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD if possible; otherwise return as written

fields.name: brokerName
fields.description: Full name of the service provider (broker or real-estate agent) who prepared the BPO
fields.label: Service Provider Name

aiHints.context: Found in the signature block at the bottom of the report, labeled 'Service Provider Name'

fields.name: repairCost
fields.description: Estimated cost of repairs/renovations to bring the property to its repaired condition, as stated in the BPO
fields.label: Repair Cost

aiHints.context: Found in the 'Repair Cost & Commentary' section, on a line reading 'The repair/renovation cost quoted in the client instructions is $XX,XXX'. May differ from the service provider's own estimate.
aiHints.format: number — extract as numeric value without currency symbols or commas
